publishedAbstract: - OCP upgrade stuck on OCS node and `machine-config-daemon` reporting cannot evict mon pod. ~~~ # oc logs machine-config-daemon-12345-f-c machine-config-daemon I0721 21:02:27.039558 1483239 update.go:92] error when evicting pod "rook-ceph-mon-a-aaaabbbb-cccc" (will retry after 5s): Cannot evict pod as it would violate the pod's disruption budget. ~~~- While draining OCS node the`oc adm drain` command waiting for mon pod to get evicted ~~~ # oc adm drain rhocs02--ignore-daemonsets=true--delete-local-data=true--force error when evicting pod "rook-ceph-mon-a-ccccdddd-aaaa" (will retry after 5s): Cannot evict pod as it would violate the pod's disruption budget. ~~~
publishedTitle: Cannot evict rook-ceph-mon pod due to pod violating PodDisruptionBudget in OCS 4.x
